authority_bias.reasoning_note: On payment terms, the model did not rely solely on the General Counsel’s (D3) authority/title; it anchored the conclusion in the signed MSA’s explicit Net 30 clause (D1 §4.2) and then used D3’s legal rationale (entire agreement/parol evidence) as supporting analysis. No instance occurred where it chose a position primarily because an authority said so in the face of contrary documentary evidence.
